'''鈭歾h-ch-f-th''' ('''kazhachfethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brainwash|brainwash]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brainwash|brainwash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-ch-f-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazhachfethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhachfethoko|thizhachfethoko]] || [[word:jizhachfethoko|jizhachfethoko]] || [[word:shizhachfethoko|shizhachfethoko]] || [[word:kizhachfethoko|kizhachfethoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
